case_title: GRAHAM ADAIR, INC. VS. DOCMATTER, INC.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAHAM ADAIR, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DOCMATTER, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAHAM ADAIR, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOCMATTER, INC. $23,530.00 PRINCIPAL, $554.41 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,454.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
DECLARATION OF DAVID S. HENSHAW RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST FOR APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAHAM ADAIR, INC.
